title: Jeju City, JJD — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jeju City, JJD: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jeju City is a city in JJD with a population of 500,000. The largest city on Jeju Island, a volcanic paradise known for its stunning coastline, Hallasan Mountain, and unique culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
